title: User Profile & Dynamic Routing
subtitle: Dynamic routes, URL params, optional chaining, and navigation patterns
prerequisites: week1 — React Router nested layouts from Day 5
day08 — optional chaining for API data
day12 — Context cart accessible across routes
expectedOutcome: Define dynamic routes with URL parameters like /users/:userId
Read and type route params with useParams in TypeScript
Fetch and display user profile details from API or mock data
Navigate programmatically with useNavigate and Link
Handle invalid user IDs with a Not Found page
definitionOfDone: Profile displays name, email, avatar, and bio from API
Navigation links from user list to profile pages
Invalid userId shows Not Found UI
Optional chaining prevents crashes on missing profile fields

tomorrowPreview.title: Machine Coding Round 2
tomorrowPreview.summary: Tomorrow is your 120-minute Week 2 review build — product listing, search, filter, pagination, and cart without referring to previous code.
